title: The Truth of the Void Century Spreads
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Zoro, York, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Dorry as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Rob Lucci of Cipher Pol "Aigis" Zero...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's still tied up in the control room...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's on the fourth floor of building a.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two that just ran off are... Roronoa Zoro and jinbe, the Knight of the Sea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are five more straw hats up here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huff... they're preparing to escape from the back entrance of the LABO-stratum!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, there are 85 Cipher Pol agents and four separation imprisoned in the basement...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we have 6 minutes before vegapunk's message.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...in the control room, he was badly injured.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Please find a way to spare him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IT IS HARD TO SINGLE OUT A LONG INSECT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gaba BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA! They tell tales about this God in Elbaf!! Where did you learn about how he looked?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a pleasant surprise!! Gaba BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi sh

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What enormous beasts! It feels like we're back in the jungles of Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Old-timers! We're not meant to fight right now, we're supposed to run away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We know!!! Sanji told us when we bumped into him earlier!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're meeting up on the other end of the island!"

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: DORRY!! BROGY!! I'm counting on you!!

dialogue.speaker: Atlas
dialogue.text: We decided to help you escape...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The reports said the Navy was Surround- Ding you, after all!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 47 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
